name: Blazing Cranberry Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Several hours ahead: In a saucepan, combine raisins and cranberries with water. Let soak for 20 minutes.
2. Meanwhile, wash and pick over the cranberries.
3. Add the washed cranberries and sugar to the pan with raisins and cook, covered, until the skins of the berries burst (about 10 minutes).
4. Allow the mixture to cool.
5. Preheat the oven to 425 Degrees F (220 Degrees C).
6. Roll out the bottom crust of pie; fit it into a pie plate and set aside.
7. Roll out the top crust, then cut it into 1/2 inch strips for creating a lattice top.
8. Fill the lined pie plate with the cooked cranberry filling.
9. Arrange the strips on top to make a lattice design.
10. Flute the edges of the crust.
11. Bake for 30 minutes, or until the crust is well browned. Serve slightly warm.
12. To serve: Dot several open spaces with sugar cubes dipped in lemon extract and light them with a match. Serve immediately as is, or with vanilla ice cream.
